title: Danmo
description: Provides a variety of optimizations and improvements gameplay experience in multiplayer
body:
**Simple & Lightweight Optimize Modpack**
=============

This modpack includes some mods that can improve vanilla gameplay, fixing some bugs on the client.

*Feature*
-------------
* Optimized for Multiplayer
* Focusing on Server Compatibility
* You can use shader with [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
* Record your gameplay with [Replaymod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod)
* Better IME input experience
* Autoreconnect
* Also, some basic optimization mods and patches
* I kept the vanilla experience as much as I could.
